news.summary: Juniper Networks, based in Sunnyvale, California, has unveiled new advancements in the Mist AI-native networking platform. These innovations offer increased visibility and confidence to users of wired, wireless, and WAN services. The improved Marvis Minis feature now allows for enhanced digital experience mirroring worldwide through the WAN, covering public and private cloud systems and apps. Additionally, a new Marvis Actions self-driving dashboard has been introduced to streamline network management processes. These updates aim to benefit both customers and partners of Juniper Networks by providing comprehensive networking solutions.
news.headline: Juniper Networks introduces AI-native networking innovations with expanded insights for wired, wireless, and WAN customers. Marvis Minis now covers global WAN, including cloud environments. Marvis Actions dashboard streamlines network operations.

news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report titled "Switzerland Data Center Market - Investment Analysis & Growth Opportunities 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Swiss Data Center Market had a value of USD 1.02 billion in 2024 and is anticipated to hit USD 1.99 billion by 2030, showcasing a growth rate of 11.72% in that period. Noteworthy data center operators in Switzerland include Digital Realty, Equinix, Green, Vantage Data Centers, and STACK.
news.headline: Swiss data center market to double by 2030, reaching USD 1.99 billion with 11.72% CAGR. Several key operators present.

news.summary: Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) has launched a new mobile app called myEquifax™ for Android™ and iPhone® on May 7, 2025. The app provides consumers with enhanced convenience in monitoring and managing their credit accounts, empowering them with greater control over their financial health. This release aims to streamline access to credit information, catering to the increasing demand for digital financial management tools.
news.headline: Equifax launches myEquifax™ mobile app for Android™ and iPhone® to help consumers monitor credit accounts easily.

news.summary: China has recently issued trademarks for the Jumptuit logo and brand, joining countries like the United States, India, Japan, Hong Kong, United Kingdom, United Arab Emirates, and Switzerland. The AI research and development company, Jumptuit, made the announcement on May 7, 2025. This move represents a significant milestone for Jumptuit, with the number of countries awarding trademarks for its logo and brand now totaling eight.
news.headline: Jumptuit receives trademarks in China, expanding coverage to 8 countries including US, India, Japan; NY, May 7, 2025.

news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado, on May 7, 2025, CaliberMRI, a company specializing in standardizing Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) processes, revealed that their integrated quality assurance (QA) software platform, qCal-MR®, can now conduct phantom scan analysis on over 40 different models and brands of MRI scanners. This advancement signifies significant progress in ensuring quality control and consistency across a wide range of MRI equipment.
news.headline: CaliberMRI supports MRI scans from 0.064T to 7T to improve standards. qCal-MR® supports 40+ MRI scanner makes/models.

news.summary: Middleton, Massachusetts - On May 7, 2025, QKS Group, a leading market intelligence and advisory firm, unveiled its recent vertical-specific research. The report highlights a sustainable 4.85% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) within the industry. This growth reflects the sector's overarching emphasis on enhancing operational efficiency, mitigating risks, and implementing intelligent asset management strategies.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, Costamare Inc. (NYSE: CMRE) finalized the spin-off of its dry bulk business, forming a separate entity called Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited. Shareholders of Costamare Inc. were issued one common share of Costamare Bulkers for every five Costamare Inc. shares owned as of April 29, 2025. This strategic move aims to streamline operations and enhance focus within the industry.
news.headline: Costamare Inc. completes spin-off of its dry bulk business into Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited; shareholders receive 1 share for every 5 held as of April 29, 2025.

news.summary: Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited (NYSE:CMDB) shared on May 7, 2025 that it has officially emerged as a standalone, publicly traded entity separate from Costamare Inc. The company's shares are now being traded starting at 9:30 a.m., New York City time on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the symbol “CMDB.” Meanwhile, Costamare Inc. will persist in trading on the NYSE using the ticker symbol “CMRE.”
news.headline: Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited debuts on NYSE as CMDB post separation from Costamare Inc. Shares trading starting on NYSE.

news.summary: Accuray Incorporated (NASDAQ: ARAY) revealed that over 40 clinical studies utilizing their technology were showcased at ESTRO 2025. The event, held in MADISON, Wis. on May 7, 2025, emphasized the company's commitment to innovation and education through various symposia. The presentation of these studies demonstrates the extensive use and impact of Accuray technology in the medical field.
news.headline: Accuray presents long-term data on benefits of 5-session radiotherapy for prostate cancer at ESTRO 2025, 40+ clinical studies using their technology showcased. #Innovation #ProstateCancer #ESTRO2025

news.summary: JLL has named Karen Brennan as the new Chief Executive Officer of their Leasing Advisory division worldwide. Kelly Howe is set to take over as the Chief Financial Officer starting July 1, 2025. The announcement was made in Chicago on May 7, 2025, marking a significant change in the company's senior leadership.
news.headline: Karen Brennan appointed CEO of Leasing Advisory, Kelly Howe next CFO of JLL, effective July 1, 2025.

news.summary: Holley Performance Brands, a top player in automotive aftermarket performance solutions, released its first quarter financial results for the period ending on March 30, 2025. In comparison to the prior year, there was a 3.5% decrease in net sales, amounting to $153.0 million versus $158.6 million. However, net sales for the core business saw growth of 3.3% during the first quarter of 2025 when excluding non-core business activities worth approximately.
news.headline: Holley Performance Brands reports Q1 2025 results: Net sales decrease by 3.5% to $153.0 million, core business grows by 3.3%.

news.summary: Fortive Corporation disclosed that their key executives, including the President and CEO James A. Lico, SVP and CFO Mark Okerstrom, and President/CEO of Precision Technologies Tami Newcombe, are scheduled to speak at the BofA Securities Industrials, Transportation & Airlines Key Leaders Conference on May 14, 2025, at 3:40 p.m. Eastern Time (12:40 p.m. Pacific Time). This event aims to provide insights to investors and industry players. Fortive is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FTV.
news.headline: Fortive to present at BofA Securities Conference on May 14th, 2025 at 3:40 p.m. ET, with key executives speaking.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Unity (NYSE: U) revealed its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company, known for its game development platform, exceeded expectations in revenue and Adjusted EBITDA. CEO Matt Bromberg expressed satisfaction with the results, emphasizing the company's commitment to operational efficiency. Amid the positive outcome, Unity's new product, Unity Vector, has shown promising initial results.
news.headline: Unity (NYSE: U) reports Q1 2025 results exceeding revenue and Adjusted EBITDA expectations, building on progress.

news.summary: MasterCraft Boat Holdings, Inc. reported their fiscal 2025 third-quarter results, excluding their former Aviara segment. Net sales for the quarter were $76.0 million, down 9.5% from the prior year. Income from continuing operations was $3.8 million, with adjusted net income at $5.0 million and adjusted EBITDA at $7.5 million. The company had cash and investments totaling $66.5 million, with $100 million available on their revolving credit facility and no outstanding debt. Adjusted EBITDA margin was 9.9%. The CEO discussed managing production levels, innovation, and cost control. For the full year, they projected net sales of around $275 million, with adjusted EBITDA of $20 million and adjusted earnings per share of $0.71. They expect capital expenditures of approximately $9 million. The company operates under the MasterCraft, Crest, and Balise brands and anticipates navigating market uncertainties with their flexible operating model and strong balance sheet. The article also mentions upcoming conference call and webcast details for further discussion on the fiscal results.
news.headline: MasterCraft Boat Holdings, Inc. reported $76.0 million in net sales for Q3 FY2025, down 9.5%. Income from operations was $3.8 million, with Adjusted Net Income at $5.0 million and Adjusted EBITDA at $7.5 million. Company predicts FY2025 net sales at $275 million, Adjusted EBITDA $20 million, and Adjusted EPS approximately $0.71. CEO emphasizes managing costs and production levels to enhance cash flow and prepare for market recovery.

news.summary: Realbotix Corp., a leading AI-powered humanoid robotics company trading under the tickers TSX-V: XBOT, Frankfurt: 76M0.F, and OTC: XBOTF, will exhibit its humanoid robots at Bitcoin 2025 from May 27th to 29th at The Venetian Resort in Las Vegas. Aria, their flagship humanoid robot, will act as the official greeter, assisting attendees with booth locations, answering queries, and providing general information during the conference.
news.headline: Realbotix will exhibit humanoid robots at Bitcoin 2025 with Aria as the greeter, at The Venetian Resort, Las Vegas.

news.summary: Orogen Therapeutics, a drug discovery company based in Woburn, Massachusetts, has added two new members to its Board of Directors. The company specializes in using its AI-enabled DNA encoded library technology to discover new compounds for potential drugs. The new members are Mikael Dolsten, M.D., Ph.D., former Chief Scientific Officer and President of Research and Development at Pfizer, and Dieter Weinand, a biopharma expert. This expansion brings the total number of board members to ___ (number).
news.headline: Orogen Therapeutics adds Mikael Dolsten and Dieter Weinand to Board; Biopharma leaders join as Independent Non-Executive Directors.

news.summary: Payoneer Global Inc. announced its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company's stock, listed as PAYO on the NASDAQ, was the subject of the report.
news.headline: Payoneer (NASDAQ: PAYO) shares Q1 2025 financial results, ending Mar 31, 2025.

news.summary: Premium Brands Holdings Corporation reported its first quarter 2025 results, with record revenue of $1.68 billion, a 14.9% increase from 2024. Specialty Foods' U.S. sales grew to $804.4 million, representing 68.6% of total sales. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $136.5 million, a 12.8% increase. Adjusted EPS was $0.68 per share, up 25.9%. The company reaffirmed sales guidance of $7.2-$7.4 billion and adjusted EBITDA guidance of $680-$700 million for 2025. The company declared a dividend of $0.85 per share for Q2 2025. The company's CEO, George Paleologou, discussed strong performance in core sales initiatives and ongoing efforts to mitigate challenges such as cost inflation and tariff-related uncertainties. Specialty Foods and Premium Food Distribution segments both saw revenue and gross profit growth. Specialty Foods' gross margin decreased by 150 basis points due to cost inflation, while PFD's decreased by 100 basis points primarily due to higher selling prices. SG&A expenses decreased as a percentage of revenue for both segments. Adjusted EBITDA was $136.5 million, with Specialty Foods contributing $106.8 million and PFD $24.3 million. Corporate costs were ($9.6) million. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Premium Brands Holdings Corp reported record Q1 sales of $1.68 billion, up 14.9% from 2024. Q1 adjusted EBITDA reached $136.5 million, a 12.8% increase. Also, declared a $0.85 dividend for Q2 2025.

news.summary: In the initial quarter of 2025, the company reported a GAAP net income of $3.1 million, equivalent to $0.27 per basic weighted average common share. Additionally, Distributable Earnings for the same period amounted to $3.5 million, or $0.31 per basic weighted average common share.
news.headline: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. reports Q1 2025 GAAP net income of $3.1 million ($0.27/share) and Distributable Earnings of $3.5 million ($0.31/share).

news.summary: Spartan RV Chassis, a brand under The Shyft Group (NASDAQ: SHYF), has announced expanded service support for Spartan RV owners. This new initiative provides access to service at 148 Rush Truck Centers locations across the U.S. and Canada. The move aims to enhance the customer experience and ensure convenient service availability for Spartan RV owners. The initiative is part of The Shyft Group's strategy to strengthen its position as the North American leader in specialty vehicles.
news.headline: Spartan RV Chassis teams up with Rush Truck Centers, giving RV owners service support at 148 locations in North America.

news.summary: In Las Vegas on May 7, 2025, renowned chef Grant MacPherson introduced his fourth cookbook, titled Viva La Lobster. MacPherson, known for supervising the daily preparation of 500 lobsters at the Bellagio in Las Vegas and having cooked for high-profile figures such as Princess Diana and various presidents, showcased his culinary expertise in this latest publication. This cookbook marks his latest contribution to the culinary world, reflecting his passion for creating dishes incorporating lobsters.
news.headline: Renowned chef Grant MacPherson releases "Viva La Lobster," a cookbook with 53 recipes turning lobster into unique dishes.

news.summary: In Lakewood, Colorado, as of May 7, 2025, customers have the opportunity to receive complimentary gifts, exclusive discounts, and valuable guidance on creating a more sustainable and healthy beauty and hygiene regimen. Natural Grocers® is committed to providing trusted education to assist customers in developing body care habits that prioritize health, transparency, and environmental responsibility.
news.headline: Natural Grocers hosts Body Care & Beauty Bonanza from May 9-30, 2025 with free gifts, discounts to promote cleaner beauty routines.

news.summary: Abaxx Technologies Inc., a financial software and market infrastructure company based in Toronto, reported on May 7, 2025, that they have completed the first delivery under a carbon futures contract on Abaxx Exchange. The company, listed as CBOE:ABXX and OTCQX:ABXXF, is the majority shareholder of Abaxx Singapore Pte Ltd., which owns Abaxx Commodity Exchange and Clearinghouse. In addition to their financial services, Abaxx also produces the SmarterMarkets™ Podcast.
news.headline: Abaxx reports first carbon futures delivery on Abaxx Exchange, majority shareholder of Abaxx Singapore Pte Ltd.

news.summary: A recent clinical study published in the Agro FOOD Industry hi-tech journal revealed that Lubrizol’s CURCUSHINE™ microcapsules, a curcumin ingredient, effectively enhances skin radiance and diminishes wrinkle depth. The study showcased significant benefits of CURCUSHINE™ for nutraceutical beauty-from-within applications. Lubrizol will be showcasing the study's results at booth #4F10 at the Vitafoods event. This product has shown promising results in improving skin health according to the study.
news.headline: Study shows CURCUSHINE™ microcapsules improve skin radiance and reduce wrinkles. Published in Agro FOOD Industry hi-tech journal by Lubrizol. Visit booth #4F10 at Vitafoods for results.
